items.headline: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview (Apr 20)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview (Apr 20)** — Last report covered through the 35B-A3B and Qwen3.6-Plus. This window adds the **Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, top of 6 benchmarks above Plus**, with deltas of SkillsBench +9.9 / SciCode +10.8 / Terminal-Bench 2.0 +3.8. Hosted-only on Alibaba Cloud Model Studio.

items.headline: Amazon-Anthropic additional $25B investment (announced Apr 20)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Amazon-Anthropic additional $25B investment (announced Apr 20)** — Last report mentioned only "Anthropic annual revenue over $30B." Now we have **$25B added from AWS ($5B immediate + $20B milestone), 10-year $100B Anthropic commit to AWS, 5GW Trainium** — a step-change in scale. Cumulative Amazon investment hits ~$33B.

items.headline: CVE: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8)
items.diff_narrative: **New CVE: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8)** — Last report did not cover serving-side CVEs. This window introduces a **new vulnerability class — RCE from GGUF model file via Jinja2 SSTI** (multiple outlets reporting around Apr 20). Implications for local-LLM runtimes broadly.

items.headline: CISA KEV (Apr 20)
items.diff_narrative: **New CISA KEV (Apr 20)** — Last report covered only the Fortinet FortiClient EMS exploitation. Now we have a batch of **8 (Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager x3 — CVE-2026-20122 / 20128 / 20133 — plus PaperCut / TeamCity / Zimbra / Kentico / Quest KACE)** with the **Apr 23 federal deadline**.

items.headline: Simon Willison Apr 18 posts re-examined
items.diff_narrative: **New: Simon Willison Apr 18 posts re-examined** — Last report focused on his Apr 19 "Headless everything." This window adds the **Apr 18 git timeline of Claude system prompts** and **Opus 4.6→4.7 diff analysis** (Trump annotation removed, Knowledge cutoff 2026-01, developer platform → Claude Platform).

items.headline: Claude Design (released Apr 17)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Claude Design (released Apr 17)** — Not in the previous report. An Anthropic Labs research-preview product that **generates prototypes, slides, and pitch decks via Claude Opus 4.7**. Available to Pro / Max / Team / Enterprise. Exports to Canva / PPTX / PDF. Positioned against Figma.

items.headline: **vLLM**: Last report announced v0.19.1. This window: **the v0.18 / v0.19 line c
items.diff_narrative: **vLLM**: Last report announced v0.19.1. This window: **the v0.18 / v0.19 line continues as the stable; no new release.**

items.headline: **Ollama**: Last report only mentioned v0.20.0. Now we have **v0.21.0 (Apr 17)**
items.diff_narrative: **Ollama**: Last report only mentioned v0.20.0. Now we have **v0.21.0 (Apr 17)**, with stronger Apple Silicon Gemma 4 support, `ollama launch` integration with OpenClaw / Hermes / Copilot CLI, and ROCm 7.2.1.

items.headline: **llama.cpp**: Last report noted b8838 (Apr 18). This window adds **Apr 20-21 co
items.diff_narrative: **llama.cpp**: Last report noted b8838 (Apr 18). This window adds **Apr 20-21 commits** (server `/api` endpoint cleanup, etc.).

items.headline: **AWS Bedrock additions**: Last report noted only the 27-region rollout. Now we
items.diff_narrative: **AWS Bedrock additions**: Last report noted only the 27-region rollout. Now we have **Bedrock Cost Attribution** (per-IAM-principal / per-session-tag accounting linked to CUR 2.0) and **AWS Interconnect GA** (multi-cloud connectivity), per the Apr 20 weekly roundup.

items.headline: **Bay Area events**: Last report listed AI Tinkerers / Bond AI / AgentCon / MIT
items.diff_narrative: **Bay Area events**: Last report listed AI Tinkerers / Bond AI / AgentCon / MIT Tech Review. Adding **UNLOCK 2026 (Apr 22, AI × Drug Discovery, already at waitlist)** to that calendar.
